entities.conductor: a train conductor with a tall blue hat

scenes.title: The Station
scenes.background_prompt: A small country train station with a wooden platform, a wooden bench, a food stand with colorful sandwiches, train tracks leading into the distance. Sunny day. No people, no animals.
scenes.full_scene_prompt: A small country train station. A small colorful train sits on the tracks with steam puffing from the engine. A train conductor with a sandwich and a tall blue hat stands on the wooden platform checking his watch. Wooden bench and flower box on the platform. Sunny day.

CH: train conductor with a sandwich and a tall blue hat

scenes.title: The Escape
scenes.background_prompt: A train station platform with a small food stand. Train tracks stretch away from the station. Sunny day. No people, no animals, no train.
scenes.full_scene_prompt: A train station platform. A train conductor with a tall blue hat has dropped a sandwich on the ground and runs along the tracks after a small colorful train that is moving away on its own. The train is pulling away fast. A small food stand is visible on the platform behind the conductor.

A: train starts moving on its own

scenes.title: The Farm Crossing
scenes.background_prompt: Countryside landscape with green fields on both sides of train tracks. A farm crossing with a wooden gate. A side track branches off to the right toward a river. Sunny day. No people, no animals, no train.
scenes.full_scene_prompt: Countryside with green fields. A small colorful train speeds along the tracks toward a farm crossing. A large white goose stands in the middle of the tracks at the crossing, flapping its wings. The train is turning quickly onto a side track to the right, bumping and shaking. Green fields and a wooden gate at the crossing.

scenes.title: The Mud
scenes.background_prompt: A muddy riverbank where train tracks end abruptly. Thick brown mud along the bank, a slow river in the background. Tall grass on the sides. No people, no animals, no train.
scenes.full_scene_prompt: A muddy riverbank. A small colorful train has slid off the end of the tracks and is sinking into thick brown mud, tilted to one side. Its wheels are partially in the mud. A large white goose walks over, honking at the stuck train. Tall grass and a slow river in the background.

scenes.title: The Rescue
scenes.background_prompt: A muddy riverbank with train tracks visible nearby, leading back toward the countryside. A dirt path connects to the tracks. Sunny late afternoon. No people, no animals, no train.
scenes.full_scene_prompt: A muddy riverbank. A big green tractor is pulling a small colorful train out of the mud with a heavy rope tied to its front. A train conductor with a tall blue hat stands nearby, out of breath, shaking his head but laughing. A farmer sits on the tractor. A large white goose watches from a safe distance in the grass. Late afternoon light.

P: get tractor to pull train out
